info.name: EcoVault - Idea API
info.description: Postman collection for Idea CRUD operations in EcoVault platform

request.description: Retrieve a specific idea by ID (public endpoint)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Sustainable Energy Solution",
  "slug": "sustainable-energy-solution",
  "description": "A comprehensive solution for renewable energy implementation",
  "problemStatement": "Current energy sources are depleting and causing environmental damage",
  "proposedSolution": "Implement solar and wind power infrastructure with smart grid technology",
  "images": [
    "https://example.com/image1.jpg",
    "https://example.com/image2.jpg"
  ],
  "categories": [
    "category-id-1",
    "category-id-2"
  ],
  "tags": [
    "tag-id-1",
    "tag-id-2"
  ],
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "isPaid": false,
  "price": 0,
  "isFeatured": false
}

{
  "title": "Updated Sustainable Energy Solution",
  "description": "An updated comprehensive solution for renewable energy",
  "problemStatement": "Updated problem statement",
  "proposedSolution": "Updated proposed solution",
  "images": [
    "https://example.com/updated-image.jpg"
  ],
  "categories": [
    "category-id-1",
    "category-id-3"
  ],
  "tags": [
    "tag-id-1",
    "tag-id-3"
  ],
  "status": "UNDER_REVIEW",
  "isPaid": true,
  "price": 29.99,
  "isFeatured": true
}

request.description: Update an existing idea (requires authentication, author only)
Delete an idea (requires authentication, author only)
